title: Irish Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and comforting Irish stew made with tender lamb, potatoes, and vegetables.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb to the pot and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
Add the onions to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the carrots and potatoes to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the flour to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb back to the pot, along with the stew seasoning and water.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Serve hot, topped with a dollop of sour cream if desired.
If the stew seems too thick, add a little more water.
